description_long: This elaborate sculpture features a central pedestal supporting a group of human figures holding up an armillary sphere, symbolizing celestial navigation or astronomy. Surrounding the base are four dynamic horse sculptures, each rearing up with dramatic movement, and accompanied by additional smaller figures and decorative elements. The entire composition is set within a multi-tiered, circular fountain-like basin with scalloped edges, suggesting a grand public installation. The figures and horses are rendered in a patinated greenish-blue material, likely bronze, with the base and basin in a contrasting pale stone. The sculpture is highly detailed, with intricate musculature on the horses and expressive poses on the human figures. The overall impression is one of classical grandeur and mythological or allegorical significance.
description: A grand, multi-tiered sculpture with human figures holding an armillary sphere atop a pedestal, surrounded by rearing horses and set in a scalloped stone basin. The piece is richly detailed and evokes classical themes.
description_view_0: This view highlights the central figures holding the sphere and provides a clear look at two of the rearing horses in the foreground.
description_view_1: From this angle, the arrangement of the horses around the base is more symmetrical, and the details of the basin's scalloped edge are prominent.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the dynamic poses of the horses and the layered structure of the pedestal supporting the human figures.
description_view_3: Here, the rear of the sculpture is visible, showing the backs of the horses and the full circular layout of the basin.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological human figures and horses with an armillary sphere
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed in an outdoor public space, likely a plaza or park, as suggested by the stone base and open surroundings.
